subtitle.default: We specialize in minimally invasive spine surgery and stroke management.

attributes.title: Treatments & Services
attributes.subtitle: We specialize in minimally invasive spine surgery and stroke management.

attributes.title: Stroke Management
attributes.description: Rapid response "Golden Hour" treatment for ischemic and hemorrhagic strokes.

attributes.title: Brain Tumor Surgery
attributes.description: Precision removal of tumors using neuro-navigation systems to protect healthy tissue.

attributes.title: Spinal Surgery
attributes.description: Treatments for slipped discs, spinal stenosis, and trauma with minimally invasive techniques.

attributes.title: EEG & EMG Services
attributes.description: Diagnostic testing for epilepsy, nerve damage, and muscle disorders.
